title: Section 21
content: 1[21. Punishment for holding proceeds of terrorism.--Whoever knowingly holds any property derived or obtained from commission of any terrorist act or acquired through the terrorist fund shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 7, ibid., for Chapter IV (w.e.f. 21-9-2004).
